audit_items.proof_trace: The function __nfp_tun_del_route_from_cache contains zero allocations — it only frees an existing list entry via kfree(entry) when a match is found. The property assertion is vacuously true: there are no allocation paths, so no leak paths can exist. The adjacent add function (__nfp_tun_add_route_to_cache) does allocate via kmalloc but is a separate function with its own correct error handling.
